name: Eolo Sunset Bar
description: A stylish beach bar perched on the cliffs of Cala'n Forcat, on the west coast near Ciutadella. Relaxed in mood, with good cocktails and one of the finest sunset views on the island; an evening drink as the day fades.

highlights: a drink as the sun goes down over the cliffs of Cala'n Forcat
one of the finest sunsets on the western coast
a relaxed, stylish beach-bar mood close to Ciutadella
